code:
import string
import list

fn validate(_ name: String, _ age: Int) -> List<String>
  mut errors: List<String> = []
  if string.is_empty(name)
    errors = list.push(errors, "empty-name")
  end
  if age < 0
    errors = list.push(errors, "negative-age")
  end
  if age > 150
    errors = list.push(errors, "too-old")
  end
  errors
end

fn join_errors(_ errors: List<String>) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < errors.len()
    let e = match errors.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      ""
    end
    if i == 0
      result = e
    else
      result = "#{result},#{e}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let e1 = validate("", -5)
  let e2 = validate("Alice", 30)
  let e3 = validate("Bob", 200)

  if e1.len() == 0
    print("ok")
  else
    print("errors=#{join_errors(e1)}")
  end

  if e2.len() == 0
    print("ok")
  else
    print("errors=#{join_errors(e2)}")
  end

  if e3.len() == 0
    print("ok")
  else
    print("errors=#{join_errors(e3)}")
  end
end
